name: a2a_llm_pick_skill
description: Agentic A2A: discover a remote agent's Agent Card (GET_AGENT_CARD), let an LLM choose the best prompt from the advertised skills (LLM_CHAT_COMPLETE), then call the agent (CALL_AGENT). Discovery + reasoning + invocation, all durable.

inputParameters.instructions: You are given an A2A agent's Agent Card (its skills) and a user goal. Reply with ONLY the single best prompt to send that agent.
